channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Woman Killed in Apparent Murder-Suicide by Former Partner in Bristol
item.description: In a tragic incident in Stapleton, Bristol, Joanne Shaw, a 35-year-old mother and former public school student, was killed by her ex-partner Ryan Kelly, a 41-year-old known criminal, in what police de...

item.title: University of Hong Kong Develops Corrosion-Resistant Stainless Steel for Green Hydrogen Production
item.description: Researchers at the University of Hong Kong have created a novel stainless steel, named SS-H2, capable of withstanding the extreme conditions required for green hydrogen production from seawater. Led b...

item.title: Safety warnings issued over fake and illegally refilled gas cylinders as winter demand rises
item.description: As winter approaches and households increasingly turn to liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) to manage rising electricity costs, concerns are growing about the spread of counterfeit and illegally refilled g...

item.title: Paraguay President Santiago Peña Palacios visits the Philippines for official bilateral meeting with Marcos
item.description: Paraguay President Santiago Peña Palacios arrived in Manila on Sunday afternoon for an official visit, marking the first presidential visit between Paraguay and the Philippines. Upon arrival at Ninoy ...

item.title: Evacuation of Cruise Ship Passengers After Hantavirus Exposure
item.description: The first evacuation flight carrying passengers from the hantavirus-affected MV Hondius cruise ship departed Spain's Canary Islands for Madrid on Sunday. Spanish nationals were the first to disembark ...

item.title: Parliament praises Oryx Energies for supporting Tanzania’s clean energy and local jobs
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Energy and Minerals recently visited Oryx Energies’ facilities in Dar es Salaam and showed strong appreciation for the company’s contribution to Tanzania’s ener...

item.title: Richmond Tigers persist with rebuilding strategy despite heavy loss to Adelaide
item.description: Richmond’s AFL side suffered a 37-point loss to Adelaide at the MCG, continuing a tough start to the season. Despite leading by 10 points at half-time, the injury-hit Tigers were unable to maintain mo...

item.title: Senator Mohammad Goje Cleared by APC Screening Committee, Reaffirms Strong Support from Gombe Central Constituents
item.description: Senator Mohammad Danjuma Goje, former governor of Gombe State and current senator representing Gombe Central Senatorial District, don declare say him ready to contest for another term for the All Prog...

item.title: John Mbadi Urges ODM Members to Respect Party Structure Amid Post-Raila Transition
item.description: In Mombasa on Sunday, Treasury Cabinet Secretary John Mbadi publicly criticised Kisumu Women Representative Ruth Odinga over remarks she allegedly misrepresented. Mbadi stressed that ODM is a national...

item.title: Fashion highlights and misses on the red carpet at the 2026 BAFTA Television Awards
item.description: The 2026 BAFTA Television Awards took place on Sunday evening at the Royal Festival Hall in London, with stars arriving in a mix of glamorous, bold, and questionable outfits. The event, hosted by Greg...

item.title: Norovirus Outbreak Affects Over 100 Passengers and Crew on Caribbean Princess Cruise
item.description: A norovirus outbreak has affected more than 100 individuals aboard the Caribbean Princess cruise, according to the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). The outbreak, reported during the s...

item.title: Rising Drug Costs Force Residents to Choose Local Remedies Over Prescribed Medications
item.description: Residents of Benin City, Edo State, don dey complain as drug prices for Nigeria don skyrocket, wey make plenty people dey turn to native remedies or dey buy drugs in small quantities instead of follow...

item.title: Punjab BJP Accuses AAP of Turning Protest into Violence, Demands Action Against Attack on Party Office
item.description: In a sharp political confrontation in Punjab, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has strongly criticised the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) for what it calls 'open hooliganism'. Punjab BJP president Ashwani Shar...

item.title: Daily Superquiz and Mini Crossword Updates
item.description: The Sydney Morning Herald and The Age offer readers a daily Superquiz to challenge their knowledge. The latest edition, published for Monday, May 11, encourages participation in a Mini Crossword consi...

item.title: Pakistan Commemorates First Anniversary of Marka-i-Haq with Tribute to Armed Forces
item.description: On May 10, 2026, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed a ceremony at the Pakistan Monument in Islamabad to mark the first anniversary of Marka-i-Haq, an episode of conflict between Pakistan and Indi...

item.title: Alberta Premier Seeks Federal Agreement on West Coast Pipeline to Address Regional Concerns
item.description: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith has indicated that finalizing an energy agreement with the federal government, including the construction of a new West Coast oil pipeline, could help reduce separatist ...

item.title: Filipino crew members of MV Hondius to undergo 42-day quarantine in the Netherlands after hantavirus outbreak
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – A total of 38 Filipino crew members from the Netherlands-flagged expedition cruise ship MV Hondius, which reported a hantavirus outbreak on May 4, 2026, are set to face strict qu...

item.title: Stormers aim to fix errors ahead of decisive Cardiff clash after Ulster draw
item.description: The Stormers left Belfast feeling frustrated after a 38-38 draw against Ulster in their penultimate United Rugby Championship (URC) round-robin match, where missed opportunities denied them a full fiv...

item.title: Arusha residents to benefit from free week-long cataract surgery campaign
item.description: Arusha is set to welcome a team of Spanish eye specialists later this month for a week-long cataract surgery campaign at Meru District Hospital. Organised by Ratpanat Group, a Spanish tourism company ...

item.title: Stronger Professional Accountability Could Improve Municipal Service Delivery, Says Imesa
item.description: The Institute of Municipal Engineering of Southern Africa (Imesa) has highlighted that improving professional accountability among municipal officials could help mitigate South Africa’s ongoing local ...
